seo.title: Bovada Withdrawal Guide 2026 | Fees, Limits & Times
seo.description: Exactly how to withdraw from Bovada. Breakdown of Bitcoin limits, check courier fees, payout times, and mandatory KYC verification requirements.

tax_reporting.notes: Bovada does not issue W-2G or 1099 forms. US taxpayers are legally required to self-report all gambling winnings on Schedule 1 / Form 1040.

withdrawal_methods.pro_tip: Always withdraw to an intermediary non-custodial wallet (like Exodus) before sending to Coinbase. Coinbase frequently bans accounts receiving direct gambling deposits.
Bovada allows one free non-crypto withdrawal every 90 days. Expect a 5-10 day hold when depositing this check at a US bank due to foreign origins.

verification.kyc_trigger: First withdrawal request, or if using a new credit card
verification.pro_tip: Submit your documents the day you open your account. Do not wait until you request a payout.

common_delays: Attempting to withdraw before completing bonus rollover
withdrawal_experience.rollover_rules: All cash deposits have a mandatory 1x rollover before withdrawal to prevent money laundering.
withdrawal_experience.cancellation_window: Can be reversed while 'Pending' (typically a 12-24 hour window).

faqs.question: How long does a Bovada Bitcoin withdrawal take?
faqs.answer: Bovada states Bitcoin withdrawals take up to 24 hours, but most users receive their funds in 1 to 2 hours after the request is approved.

faqs.question: Does Bovada charge withdrawal fees?
faqs.answer: Cryptocurrency withdrawals are completely free. If you request a Check by Courier, the fee is $100, though they waive the fee for one non-crypto withdrawal every 90 days.

faqs.question: Why was my Bovada withdrawal denied?
faqs.answer: The most common reasons for a denied payout are unverified identity (KYC not complete), trying to withdraw active bonus funds before meeting rollover requirements, or entering an invalid crypto address.
